SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2019 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. SHAHDEEP SINGH DOES NOT OWE KISSI KENYA CARPENTER ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF MAR-26-2019. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shahdeep Singh, Appellant/Defendant appearing in propria persona; No other appearances.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. The matter is called at 9:33 am. Appellant is affirmed.

Shahdeep Singh testifies on his own behalf. At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes the matter under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Judgment Entered
